name: endorlabs-datadog-bridge
description: Send Endor Labs reachable vulnerability and malware findings to Datadog as logs

scripts.setup:secrets: grep -v '^#' .env | grep -v '^$' | sed 's/ *#.*//' | while IFS='=' read -r key value; do echo "Setting $key…"; gh secret set "$key" --body "$value"; done
